specific_question: From July 2024 to September 2024, how many continuing education hours did each customer service representative complete?
answer: Each MediConn Solutions' customer service representative completed an average of 8 hours of continuing education from July 2024 to September 2024,  covering topics like de-escalation techniques, PIPEDA updates, and new platform features.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
